title: A Recurring Dream
overview: Souza is tormented by frequent nightmares of the Honnoji Incident, which serves as a precursor to the arrival of Fudou Yukimitsu, another Oda Nobunaga sword, to the Citadel.

title: A Worthy Man
overview: Things come to a head between Fudou Yukimutsu and Heshikiri Hasebe, and Yamanbagiri has to come up with a way to resolve the Oda swords' issues.

title: The Stories That Tell
overview: Yamanbagiri has been appointed Attendant Sword, and his first task is to come up with a countermeasure to the increase in the Time Retrograde Army's strength. To add to that, Fudou Yukimitsu is also proving to be a problem…

title: Steel Forges Steel
overview: The combat exercise begins, with the ultimate goal of bringing the Oda swords together. But will things go as planned?

title: Reunions and Conflicts
overview: Yamanbagiri's squad is in Kyoto to prevent any meddling in the Honnoji Incident. Fudou is excited to be back and goes off alone, only to run into Mori Ranmaru.

title: The Honnoji Incident
overview: With the Honnoji Incident looming, the former Oda swords express their complicated feelings about their former owner. And Akechi Mitsuhide raises the curtain on the fateful battle...

title: For Whom the Flower Blooms
overview: The corrupted Mori Ranmaru makes his last stand, and the squad has complicated feelings going up against him.

title: Honnoji In Flames
overview: Fudou Yukimitsu goes after Mitsuhide in a bid to carry out Ranmaru's wish as the Honnoji Incident comes to a close.
